query: what's our reactive vs proactive maintenance ratio?
expected_behavior: Computes the ratio on LABOR HOURS (LABTRANS), not on WO counts (SMRP semantics)
Does NOT equate WORKTYPE='CM' with reactive — recognizes corrective work found pre-failure from PM/PdM is proactive
Surfaces that the reactive/proactive classification rule and any planned-flag are customer-specific (asks rather than fabricating a clean split)
